summary:
Recovery: Average

Reading: State
Average
Recovery 51 • Sleep 62 • Strain 56%

Read
Recovery is serviceable but not full, and today’s intake is running behind the effort already spent. The evening window favors measured strength work only if the protein and energy picture closes, with muscle protection more important than chasing extra output.

Muscle first.

Performance: Muscle first.

Transit: none
